content: Assalamu Alaikum sir, yeh mene order kiya tha aur yeh kala aaya hai aur mene yeh apply to open karwaya tha lekin woh rider bahut late aaya tha is wajah se meh check nahi kar sakti. To ghar mein jo log the unhone isse receive kar diya tha. To ab masalah yeh hai ki isko mene open kiya hai to open karke ek to yeh jahan se isse handle karte hain wo saara tooti hui hai peechhe se aur jo iska blade hai agar meh lagati hoon to wo blade loose hai aur wo uske andar lagta nahi hai aur jab meh usse bandh karti hoon to woh khul ke us dabbi mein gir jata hai.
sir, paisa delivery ke waqt dena hai 💵 7 din exchange guarantee ✅ FREE delivery 🚚 Aap check karke paisa dein.
haan ji nahi order karna chahiye delivery kitne ka hai price sasta mehenga theek hai bhej do confirm Lahore Karachi Islamabad Rawalpindi Faisalabad T9 Trimmer Blackhead Remover Nebulizer Nebulizer

content: Sir ye mujhe aap kya message forward kar rahe hain, main aap se jo keh rahi hu usko check karein ki ye peechay se handle se toota hai aur uske walawa ye jo blade se fix nahi ho raha hai to ye mujhe change karke dein.
sir, aapka masla samajh aata hai 🙏 Main apni team se baat karta hun, woh jaldi rabta karein ge.
